title.ko: 자전거용 안장 또는 시트; 자전거에 특별히 적합한 부가적인 장치 또는 부속품 및 달리 분류되지 않는 것, 예. 자전거용의 화물대 또는 자전거용의 보호장치
title.en: CYCLE SADDLES OR SEATS; AUXILIARY DEVICES OR ACCESSORIES SPECIALLY ADAPTED TO CYCLES AND NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR, e.g. ARTICLE CARRIERS OR CYCLE PROTECTORS

definition.ko: 새들, 시트; 발판, 무릎 그립(KNEE GRIP), 승객용 손잡이 B62J1/00; B62J25/00 조명 또는 신호장치; 거울장치 B62J3/00, B62J6/00; B62J29/00 물품운반장치, 부속품 B62J7/00, B62J9/00, B62J11/00 방호장치 또는 부속품 체인보호구; 흙받이; 주차용 커버 B62J13/00; B62J15/00; B62J19/00 운전자만이 사용하는 것; 날씨용 보호구, 풍방; 의복 보호구; 보온구 B62J17/00; B62J21/00; B62J33/00 그 밖의 방호구 B62J23/00 안전장치 B62J27/00 윤활장치; 연료탱크; 공급라인 장치 B62J31/00; B62J35/00; B62J37/00 다음의 장치: 공기 청정기 B62J40/00 방열기, 자전거 장착 냉각 호스 또는 파이프 B62J41/00 배터리 B62J43/00 달리 분류되지 않는 전기 장비 장치 B62J45/00 기타 장치 또는 부속품 B62J50/00, B62J99/00

title.ko: 자전거용 안장 또는 시트; 그것에 관련된 장치; 구성 부품
title.en: Saddles or other seats for cycles; Arrangement thereof; Component parts
Saddles resiliently mounted on the frame; Equipment therefor, e.g. springs
Saddles capable of swinging about a horizontal pivot
Saddles capable of parallel motion up and down

title.ko: 새들의 프레임; 새들 프레임과 시트 포스트와의 연결구; 시트 포스트(자전차 프레임의 시트 포스트 장착물 B62K 19/36)
title.en: Frames for saddles; Connections between saddle frames and seat pillars; Seat pillars (attaching seat pillars to cycle frames B62K0019360000)
Internal adjustment of saddles
Box-shaped seats; Bench-type seats, e.g. dual or twin seats
Separate pillions
for children
Covers for saddles or other seats; Paddings
Detachable covers; Detachable pads
Covers with built-in paddings
Paddings involving torsional or bending springs
Paddings involving other resilient material, e.g. sponge rubber with inflatable compartments
Other additional equipment, e.g. back rests for children

title.ko: 음향 신호 장치 (자전거의 비인가 사용을 지시하는 장치 B62H5/20); 자전거에 이와 같은 장치의 배치
title.en: Signal or lighting devices specially adapted for cycles

title.ko: 음향 신호 장치 (자전거의 비인가 사용을 지시하는 장치 B62H5/20); 자전거에 이와 같은 장치의 배치
title.en: Acoustic signal devices (arrangements indicating unauthorised use of cycles B62H0005200000); Arrangement of such devices on cycles
Mechanical devices
activated by the rider, e.g. bells or horns
activated by rotating parts of cycles, e.g. rattles hitting spokes
activated by driving wind, e.g. flutes
Electrical devices
Buzzers; Horns with electrically driven airflow
indicating functioning of other devices, e.g. acoustic warnings indicating that lights are switched on

title.ko: 사이클에 광 신호 장치 또는 조명 장치의 배치; 이의 장착 또는 지지; 이를 위한 회로
title.en: Arrangement of optical signalling or lighting devices on cycles; Mounting or supporting thereof; Circuits therefor
Electric circuits
using electrical power not supplied by the cycle motor generator, e.g. using batteries or piezo elements

title.ko: 전조등
title.en: Headlights

title.ko: 모터사이클 또는 유사한 것에 특별히 적합한 것
title.en: specially adapted for motorcycles or the like
responsive to the lean angle of the cycle, e.g.  changing intensity or switching sub-lights when cornering

title.ko: 상향등 및 하향등 간 전환 (스위치 장치 B62J6/16)
title.en: Switching between high and low beam  (arrangement of switches B62J0006160000)
characterised by vertical adjustment of the light beam direction, e.g. to compensate for heavy loads
characterised by the structure, e.g. casings
Supporting means therefor, e.g. mounting brackets
specially adapted for rider-propelled cycles with or without additional source of power
characterised by the structure, e.g. casings
Supporting means therefor, e.g. mounting brackets
Rear lights
indicating braking
Direction indicators
Mechanical means, e.g. rotating arms
driven by ropes or chains
operated manually
Electrical means, e.g. lamps
characterised by control means
Automatic activation, e.g. by sensors

title.ko: 조명용 발전기 또는 그것의 구동 장치에 관련되는 장치
title.en: Arrangement of lighting dynamos or drives therefor
Tyre drives

title.ko: 기어 구동에 의한 것(B62J 6/12가 우선)
title.en: Gear drives (B62J0006120000 takes precedence)
Dynamos arranged in the wheel hub
Belt drives
Arrangement of switches
Wireless switches

title.ko: 반사경에 관한 장치(반사경을 갖는 페달 B62M 3/12)
title.en: Arrangement of reflectors (pedals incorporating reflectors B62M0003120000)
Warning or information lights
warning or informing the rider, e.g. low fuel warning lights
warning or informing other road users, e.g. police flash lights
Article carriers
Luggage carriers
characterised by the arrangement thereof on cycles
arranged above or behind the rear wheel
arranged above the front wheel, e.g. on the handlebars
Equipment for securing luggage on carriers

title.ko: 자전거에 특별히 적합한 컨테이너, 예. 짐바구니 또는 안장 가방
title.en: Containers specially adapted for cycles, e.g. panniers or saddle bags
integrated with the cycle
in the fairing
under the saddle
under the floor board
in a dummy fuel tank

title.ko: 부속품으로써 자전거에 부착된
title.en: attached to the cycle as accessories
above or alongside the front wheel, e.g. on the handlebars
between the main frame tubes, e.g. suspended from the top tube

title.ko: 후륜 위 또는 옆에 있는 것 (B62J9/26이 우선)
title.en: above or alongside the rear wheel   (B62J0009260000 takes precedence)
on specially adapted racks, e.g. for top or side cases
to the fuel tank, e.g. magnetic tank bags
to the saddle, e.g. saddle bags
characterised by mounting arrangements, e.g. quick release arrangements
specially adapted for delivery service, e.g. insulated boxes
characterised by locking arrangements, e.g. top case locks integrated in a vehicle central locking system
specially adapted for tools or spare parts

title.ko: 자전거에 특정 장치를 체결하기에 특별히 적합한 지지 장치, 예. 지도를 부착하기 위한 지지체
title.en: Supporting arrangements specially adapted for fastening specific devices to cycles, e.g. supports for attaching maps
for pumps
for bottles
for sport articles, e.g. balls or golf clubs

title.ko: 기계식 케이블, 호스, 파이프 또는 전기선, 예. 케이블 가이드 (후방 변속기용 케이블 장착 또는 가이드 B62M9/127; 전방 변속기용 케이블 장착 또는 가이드 B62M9/137)
title.en: for mechanical cables, hoses, pipes or electric wires, e.g. cable guides (mounting or guiding of cables on rear derailleur B62M0009127000;mounting or guiding of cables on front derailleur B62M0009137000)
specially adapted for mechanical cables

title.ko: 호스 또는 파이프에 특별히 적합한 것, 예. 유압식, 공압식, 냉각수 또는 공기 필터 호스 (공기 필터 호스 B62J40/10)
title.en: specially adapted for hoses or pipes, e.g. hydraulic, pneumatic, coolant or air filter hoses (air filter hoses B62J0040100000)
specially adapted for electric wires
Harnesses; Arms, e.g. for dog leads

title.ko: 도구에 특별히 적합한 것 (도구용 컨테이너 B62J9/40)
title.en: specially adapted for tools (containers for tools B62J0009400000)
specially adapted for helmets  (containers under the saddle for helmets B62J0009140000)
specially adapted for umbrellas
Protectors; Fairings or streamlining parts not otherwise provided for
Guards for chain, chain drive or equivalent drive, e.g. belt drive
shielding only the upper run of the chain or the like
completely enclosing the chain drive or the like
admitting ready access to the chain or the like
Mud-guards for wheels
Fastening means; Stays
Mud flaps
Weather guards for riders; Fairings or stream-lining parts not otherwise provided for
shielding only the rider's front
Windscreens
Leg guards
Hoods protecting the rider
Frame mounted hoods specially adapted for rider propelled cycles
Frame mounted hoods specially adapted for motorcycles or the like
Ventilation or air guiding devices forming part of  fairings
Parking covers for cycles
Dress protectors, e.g. clips attached to the cycle
Other protectors specially adapted for cycles
Foot-rests; Knee grips; Passenger hand-grips
Knee grips, e.g. on fuel tanks
Floor-type foot rests
Bar-type foot rests
Passengers hand-grips
Safety equipment
Safety belts specially adapted for motorcycles or the like
Airbags specially adapted for motorcycles or the like
Crash bars; Crash bungs
Adaptations or arrangements of mirrors for use on cycles
Installations of lubricating devices
Arrangements for warming riders specially adapted for cycles
Fuel tanks specially adapted for motorcycles or engine-assisted cycles; Arrangements thereof
Arrangements of fuel supply lines, taps, or the like, on motorcycles or engine-assisted cycles
Arrangements of air cleaners specially adapted for cycles
characterised by air duct arrangements
Arrangements of radiators, coolant hoses or pipes on cycles
Arrangements of batteries
for propulsion
on rider-propelled cycles with additional electric propulsion
on motorcycles or the like
characterised by the mounting
dismounted when charging
carried on a trailer
hidden within the cycle frame
for providing power to equipment other than for propulsion

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는, 자전거에 부속품으로 사용되기에 특별히 적합한 전기적 장치
title.en: Electrical equipment arrangements specially adapted for use as accessories on cycles, not otherwise provided for
Arrangement of audio equipment; Supports therefor
Cycle computers as cycle accessories

title.ko: 센서 장치 (전기 보조 자전거의 제어용 센서 B62M6/50); 그것의 장착
title.en: Sensor arrangements (sensors for control of electrically assisted cycles B62M0006500000); Mounting thereof
characterised by the type of sensor
Torque sensors
Speed sensors
Rotation sensors
Acceleration sensors
Inclination sensors
Physiological sensors, e.g. heart rate sensors
characterised by mounting
at the pedal crank
on the handlebar
on or besides the wheel

title.ko: 메인 그룹 B62J1/00 ~ B62J45/00에 분류되지 않는 자전거 용도에 특별히 적합한 장치
title.en: Arrangements specially adapted for use on cycles not provided for in main groups B62J0001000000-B62J0045000000
Means for carrying cycles by hand
Cleaning devices
for cleaning parts of the cycle, e.g. windscreen wipers
for using the cycle as a cleaning device, e.g. floor sweeping
Information-providing devices
intended to provide information to rider or passenger
electronic, e.g. displays
mechanical, e.g. cable-driven trip meters
intended to provide information to other road users, e.g. signs or flags
Number plates
characterised by quick release, e.g. snap on connectors
Means for ventilation within devices provided on the cycle, e.g. ventilation means in a battery container
Ornaments or toys
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
